title: 18w44a Bell
description: Brings back the bell model from 1.14 Snapshot, 18w44a, which uses the oak planks texture rather than stone.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**18w44a Bell** brings back the apperance of the bell from 1.14 snapshot, 18w44a. It changes the model to use oak planks instead of stone.
